description_long: This is a pair of women's open-toe heeled sandals featuring a single wide, woven strap across the forefoot and a low, block heel. The upper strap is a textured, basket-weave design in a light tan or caramel color, providing both visual interest and a secure fit. The insole is smooth and lightly cushioned, with the brand name 'NAZIRA FRIJAND' printed in white near the heel area. The outsole and heel are a solid, matte beige, contrasting subtly with the upper. The overall silhouette is sleek and modern, suitable for casual or semi-formal urban settings. The shoes appear new, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A pair of tan woven-strap, open-toe heeled sandals with a block heel and smooth insole, branded 'NAZIRA FRIJAND'. The shoes are new and stylish, ideal for urban wear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the block heels and the open back of the sandals, with the woven straps arching forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the block heel, the smooth insole, and the woven strap across the forefoot.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the open-toe design and the wide, woven straps covering the forefoot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the block heel and the woven strap, mirroring the details of view 1.
attribute_logo: white printed text on the insole near the heel
